creator: void.stringdaemon@mail.ru
text:
Every NetBeans IDE from www.netbeans.org core dumps on FreeBSD 8.1

How-To-Repeat: pkg_add -r openjdk6 (OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 1.6.0-b19)

download NetBeans IDE from netbeans org, unzip it and set in netbeans.conf the default netbeans_jdkhome="/usr/local/openjdk6/"

after start NetBeans IDE core dumps
